text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day of Fine Motion's debut. She looks
exhilarated in the lead-up to the race. Initially,
I'm a little concerned that she won't take this
seriously, but she puts my fears to rest quickly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion explains that she knows that she'll
have even more fun the harder she tries to win. It
looks like she's ready to give this race her all!
